use_codes.desc: MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF BRONCHOCONSTRICTION IN PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD)

indications.text:
1.1 Maintenance Treatment of COPD
PERFOROMIST (formoterol fumarate) Inhalation Solution is indicated for the long-term, twice daily (morning
and evening) administration in the maintenance treatment of bronchoconstriction in patients with chronic
obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), including chroni...
